source_note.value: Demo-only synthesized Statement of Authority for Delgado parcel 304-78-411 — A.R.S. § 33-432 filing recorded the same day as the LLC conveyance (20220200003) to establish of record that Maria Elena Delgado is the authorized signer for the LLC.
